channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: What Packers coach called the Detroit Lions fan who ‘got in his face’ before game
item.description: Green Bay Packers head Coach Matt LaFleur had strong words about a Detroit Lions fan who “got in his face” on the field before the game.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: No. 18 Clemson beats No. 8 SMU 34-31 on last-second field goal for ACC title, berth in the CFP
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Cade Klubnik sat in his car for more than hour last Saturday crying following Clemson's loss to rival South Carolina, figuring his team's chances of reaching the College Football Playoff were over. My how things can change.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Oregon staves off valiant Penn State effort to win Big Ten title
item.description: The Oregon Ducks moved to 13-0 by winning the Big Ten championship game over Penn State on Saturday, ensuring a first-round bye in the playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arizona State makes College Football Playoff with 45-19 win over Iowa State in Big 12 title game
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Cam Skattebo and Arizona State are on quite a run in their Big 12 debut after being the preseason pick to finish at the bottom of the conference.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Georgia QB Carson Beck returns from hand injury for final snap in SEC championship OT win over Texas
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Georgia right guard Tate Ratledge couldn't believe it when he heard quarterback Carson Beck calling the final play in overtime of the Southeastern Conference championship game against Texas.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 5 Georgia pulls off another overtime stunner, beating No. 2 Texas 22-19 for SEC title
item.description: Gunner Stockton, a little-known backup who had barely played in his Georgia career, came off the bench after an injury to Carson Beck and led the No. 5 Bulldogs to an improbable 22-19 overtime victory over No. 2 Texas in the Southeastern Conference championship game.
item.dc:creator: Paul Newberry, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Stanford, Maxime Raynaud too much for Cal as Cardinal win on road
item.description: In first game between teams as ACC members, Stanford holds off Cal's late rally to win conference game.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Golden State Valkyries build roster by taking 11 players in expansion draft, including Kate Martin
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Once general manager Ohemaa Nyanin and her Golden State Valkyries staff had decided who to pick in the WNBA expansion draft, the first challenge became reaching each player with the news before she heard it anywhere else.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jacob Trouba isn't pleased with the Rangers' handling of his departure in a trade with Anaheim
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Jacob Trouba is finally out of New York after months of public trade rumors and private threats from the Rangers, who were determined to get rid of their captain and his massive contract.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pitcher Clay Holmes agrees to $38 million, 3-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Clay Holmes and the New York Mets have agreed to a $38 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff makes MLW debut and makes major impact
item.description: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff made his Major League Wrestling debut on Thursday night, forming matches, confronting wrestlers and even firing someone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Indiana plays Chicago on 8-game road slide
item.description: Indiana Pacers (9-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-13, eighth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Pacers -3; over/under is 247 BOTTOM LINE: Indiana travels to Chicago looking to break its eight-game road losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Utes bring in 21 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jill Ellis steps down from club president position with San Diego Wave FC
item.description: Jill Ellis, club president of the San Diego Wave FC, will be stepping down from her role with the team, the club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Illinois Football assistant coach dies at age 62
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (WCIA) -- Dana Dimel, the Senior Offensive Assistant for the Illinois Fighting Illini football team, has died. Illinois Athletics announced that the longtime coach passed away Tuesday at the age of 62. He is survived by his wife Julie and their children Winston and Joey.
item.dc:creator: Bradley Zimmerman, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago Sky, Angel Reese to open 2025 season against Indiana Fever, Caitlin Clark
item.description: Angel Reese and Caitlin Clark won't have to wait long to renew their rivalry during the next WNBA season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: 6 Chicagoland prep football programs bring home IHSA state championships over the weekend in Normal
item.description: Six Chicagoland prep football programs, including two from the city, claimed Illinois High School Association state championships over Thanksgiving weekend in Normal.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
